name: Windows Health Monitor
description: Cross-platform health monitoring for OpenClaw gateways. Detects event loop degradation, gateway stalls, channel reconnections, prewarm blocking, and stuck background subagents. Windows Task Scheduler health on Windows. External alerts via WhatsApp or Telegram are available but off by default — see SECURITY.md.

enabled.description: Enable background health monitoring. Set to false to disable entirely.

eventLoopThresholdMs.description: Event loop p99 threshold in ms. Alert when exceeded.

memoryThresholdMB.description: Memory RSS threshold in MB. Alert when exceeded.

alertChannel.description: Channel for external health alerts. Defaults to 'none' (no external transmission). See SECURITY.md for what alert data contains before enabling.

alertTarget.description: Target identifier for alerts (phone number for WhatsApp, user ID for Telegram). Only used when alertChannel is not 'none'.

autoDiagnose.description: Automatically run full diagnostics when an alert triggers. May collect additional log data. See SECURITY.md.

checkPrewarm.description: Check for provider auth prewarm blocking (2026.5.22+ issue)

checkBackgroundSubagents.description: Check for stuck background subagents blocking restart
